name: Context Propagated
description: GridContext flows from caller to callee across Node boundaries

name: Health Reported
description: Nodes contribute health and readiness signals via IHealthContributor / IReadinessContributor

name: Telemetry Emitted
description: Nodes emit traces, logs, and metrics enriched with Grid context

name: Secret Requested
description: Nodes request secrets via ISecretStore, resolved by Vault providers

name: Message Published
description: Nodes publish transport envelopes via ITransportPublisher

name: Lifecycle Hook
description: Kernel orchestrates Node startup and shutdown via IStartupHook / IShutdownHook
